entries.title: Largest Countries by Area
entries.content: Russia (17M km²), Canada, USA, China, Brazil. Smallest: Vatican City, Monaco.

entries.title: Capital Cities
entries.content: Examples: France–Paris, Japan–Tokyo, India–New Delhi, USA–Washington D.C., UK–London, Australia–Canberra.

entries.title: Seven Wonders (Ancient)
entries.content: Great Pyramid of Giza (only survivor), Hanging Gardens of Babylon, Temple of Artemis, Statue of Zeus, Mausoleum at Halicarnassus, Colossus of Rhodes, Lighthouse of Alexandria.

entries.title: Time Zones
entries.content: Earth divided into 24 standard zones (15° longitude each). UTC is reference; countries may use daylight saving.

entries.title: Oceans
entries.content: Pacific (largest), Atlantic, Indian, Southern, Arctic. Oceans cover ~71% of Earth's surface.
